title: Reject foreign unicast DIO and DIS
description: After authenticated decompression and before mutation, accept DIO/DIS only for exact local RPL unicast or ff02::1a; preserve DAO DODAG destination handling.
acceptance_criteria: Broadcast-wrapped foreign-unicast DIO/DIS cause no mutation and no response; local unicast and ff02::1a continue to work; DAO forwarding remains intact.
